title: Drone Telemetry Reactive State
short_description: Manage drone power and technical telemetry using Vue 3 reactivity core (ref and reactive).
description: In this challenge, you will build the logic for a drone control panel. You'll need to handle the engine status and real-time telemetry data like altitude and battery levels.
Your task is to implement a toggle system for the engines and a flight logic where the drone can only gain altitude if the engines are running, while simultaneously consuming battery.

objectives.data: Define reactive states using ref for primitives and reactive for objects.
Implement a toggle function to start/stop engines and reset altitude upon shutdown.
Develop a takeoff function that updates multiple reactive properties conditionally.
